name: TrinityScanner
description: Recursive folder scanner — produces a timestamped JSON report of all files in a directory
author: Victory

tools.name: scanner_scan
tools.description: Scan a directory recursively and save a JSON report to scans/

tools.name: scanner_scan_depth
tools.description: Scan a directory with a custom max depth. Input: /path/to/folder|depth

tools.name: scanner_last
tools.description: Show the most recent scan report summary
